% Fig.1: Kunai architecture — inputs, compiler pipeline, and the
% host BPF program that embeds the generated bytecode.
% Full-width U-turn layout for a two-column-spanning figure*:
% top band (L->R) inputs -> Kunai compiler, turn down at the right,
% bottom band (R->L) bytecode -> host -> action. Both bands span the
% full width.
% Build: pdflatex fig_arch.tex -> fig_arch.pdf
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usetikzlibrary{positioning, arrows.meta, fit, calc}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}[
  x=1mm, y=1mm,
  font=\small,
  box/.style={draw, rounded corners=2pt, align=center, inner sep=4pt, minimum height=10mm},
  input/.style={box, fill=gray!12, minimum width=36mm},
  stage/.style={box, fill=blue!12, minimum width=18mm},
  bcbox/.style={box, fill=orange!25, minimum width=34mm},
  host/.style={box, fill=green!12, minimum width=40mm},
  actbox/.style={box, fill=gray!8, minimum width=26mm},
  arr/.style={-{Stealth[length=2.4mm]}, semithick},
]

% --- top band: inputs (stacked, far left) ---
\node[input] (expr) at (0,0)
  {filter expression\\[-1pt] {\footnotesize\texttt{eth/ipv6/srv6 where ...}}};
\node[input, below=4mm of expr] (vocab)
  {P4 protocol definitions\\[-1pt] {\footnotesize layout / parser rules}};

% --- top band: Kunai compiler (to the right, centered on the input stack) ---
\coordinate (imid) at ($(expr.east)!0.5!(vocab.east)$);
\node[stage, anchor=west] (parse) at ($(imid)+(22,0)$) {parse};
\node[stage, right=8mm of parse] (resolve) {resolve};
\node[stage, right=8mm of resolve] (codegen) {codegen};
\node[draw, dashed, rounded corners=3pt, inner sep=5pt,
      fit=(parse)(resolve)(codegen)] (compiler) {};
\node[font=\footnotesize, anchor=south] at (compiler.north) {Kunai compiler};

% --- bottom band (R->L): bytecode under codegen, then host, then action ---
\node[bcbox, anchor=north east] (bc) at ($(compiler.south east)+(0,-16)$)
  {eBPF bytecode\\[-1pt] {\footnotesize match / reject}};
\node[host, left=12mm of bc] (hostprog)
  {host BPF program\\[-1pt] {\footnotesize XDP / tc / fentry--fexit}};
\node[actbox, left=12mm of hostprog] (act)
  {capture /\\[-2pt] drop / pass};

% --- arrows ---
\draw[arr] (expr.east)  -| (parse.north);
\draw[arr] (vocab.east) -| (resolve.south);
\draw[arr] (parse) -- (resolve);
\draw[arr] (resolve) -- (codegen);
\draw[arr] (codegen.south) |- ($(compiler.south)+(0,-8)$) -| (bc.north)
      node[pos=0.25, above=0.3mm, font=\footnotesize] {generate};
\draw[arr] (bc.west) -- node[above=0.3mm, font=\footnotesize] {embed} (hostprog.east);
\draw[arr] (hostprog.west) -- node[above=0.3mm, font=\footnotesize] {match} (act.east);

\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
